response.justification: Candidate is a capable senior/staff full-stack engineer with ~13-14 years of experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at Naver. However, the role demands a Director-level IC Principal Engineer with 15+ years, recognized AI expertise, and demonstrated AI products/platforms at strategic scale — none of which are evidenced. No advanced degree, no cloud/AI platform strategy track record, no executive customer-advisory experience, and the resume positions them as a hands-on senior developer rather than a strategic technical leader.
strengths: Broad full-stack and polyglot experience across web, mobile, embedded
Recent hands-on work with MCP and AI-agent infrastructure at Naver
Strong craftsmanship background — TDD, CI/CD, public talks, OSS projects
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI products at platform scale
Lacks Principal/Director-level IC scope and strategic customer-advisory experience
Experience just under the 15-year requirement and no advanced AI degree

key_factors.factor: Missing recognized AI expertise / built AI platforms
Seniority gap vs Director-level IC Principal scope
Recent MCP / AI-agent infra exposure at Naver
